tooltip.simplytents.tent: A basic open-ended tent. Sneak-click to pack.
tooltip.simplytents.wall_tent: A lean-to tent with an open front. Sneak-click to pack.
tooltip.simplytents.roof_tent: An open overhead canopy. Sneak-click to pack.
tooltip.simplytents.zip_tent: An enclosed tent with a toggleable door. Sneak-click to pack.
tooltip.simplytents.canvas_wall_block: A modular fabric partition. Automatically packed up when breaking a nearby tent.
tooltip.simplytents.zip_canvas_wall_bloc: A modular fabric partition with a toggleable opening. Right-click to open or close. Sneak-click to pack.
tooltip.simplytents.duo_tent: A roomy open-ended tent with extra headroom. Sneak-click to pack.
tooltip.simplytents.large_tent: A spacious open-ended tent with plenty of room inside. Sneak-click to pack.
tooltip.simplytents.duo_wall_tent: A roomy lean-to tent with extra coverage. Sneak-click to pack.
tooltip.simplytents.large_wall_tent: A spacious lean-to tent with a wide sheltered area. Sneak-click to pack.
tooltip.simplytents.duo_roof_tent: A wide open overhead canopy with extended coverage. Sneak-click to pack.
tooltip.simplytents.large_roof_tent: A broad overhead canopy offering generous shade and shelter. Sneak-click to pack.
tooltip.simplytents.duo_zip_tent: A roomy enclosed tent with a toggleable door. Sneak-click to pack.
tooltip.simplytents.large_zip_tent: A spacious enclosed tent with a toggleable door. Sneak-click to pack.
tooltip.simplytents.tipi_tent: A roomy enclosed tipi with a toggleable door. Sneak-click to pack.
tooltip.simplytents.yurt_tent: A spacious enclosed yurt with a toggleable door. Sneak-click to pack.
tooltip.simplytents.small_tipi_tent: A compact enclosed tipi with a toggleable door. Sneak-click to pack.
